summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskFlow application - both backend APIs and frontend functionality working excellently with 100% backend API success rate and fully functional frontend

design_issues.issue: Console warning about missing Description for DialogContent
Task editing requires specific interaction - clicking on task doesn't open edit modal

passed_tests: Backend API - User login with test credentials (200)
Backend API - Get current authenticated user (200)
Backend API - Create category (200)
Backend API - Get all categories (200)
Backend API - Create task with all fields (200)
Backend API - Get all tasks (200)
Backend API - Get tasks with filters (search, priority, status) (200)
Backend API - Get task by ID (200)
Backend API - Update task (200)
Backend API - Update task status via PATCH (200)
Backend API - Get statistics (200)
Backend API - Delete task (200)
Backend API - Delete category (200)
Backend API - User logout (200)
Frontend - Login page loads correctly
Frontend - Login form elements present and functional
Frontend - Login flow with test credentials works
Frontend - Dashboard displays after successful login
Frontend - Stats cards display correctly
Frontend - Kanban board displays with all three columns
Frontend - Task creation modal opens and functions
Frontend - New tasks appear in Kanban board
Frontend - Search functionality works
Frontend - Dark theme and elegant design implemented
Frontend - Authentication protection (redirects to login when not authenticated)
